fullText:
视频版的Google搜索工具：sentrysearch，给定文字描述，即能自动从视频素材中找到匹配片段并剪出来

特别适合视频需要快速回放的场景，比如说交通事故取证、媒体/影视素材管理、监控安防等等

其主要基于大模型原生视频嵌入能力，直接处理视频像素无需转录或帧描述，纯视频像素到向量的端到端方案 https://t.co/oztjW0cpRj

fullText: we'll be surprised how available and how weird jobs get in the future. things like *ENTROPY HUNTER* - where you investigate things like: "whats a rock taste like?" or "whats it like to not see the color blue for 2 weeks then suddenly walk into a room thats totally blue?"

i would like to thank the Minnesotan agronomist norman borlaug without whom I and billions of others certainly wouldn’t be alive to enjoy this glorious day and the continuation of the technological edifice upon which i now help build in my tiny way for the trillions to come
